title: Update the automatic message for a Business Account
content:
Use this endpoint to update an automatic message for a Business Account. After you update an automatic message, use [/business/message/auto_message/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184619749377) to verify the status of the message. ## Before you start Because of the sensitive nature of direct message data, TikTok has implemented a higher level of due diligence for developers that will process direct messages on behalf of Business Account users. Ensure that you [have completed the necessary data security and privacy reviews and obtained access to Business Messaging API](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184145137922) before calling this endpoint. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/auto_message/update/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|A short-term access token authorized by the TikTok Business Account owner.
For details, see [Authentication](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184175482945).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type.
Allowed format: `application/json`. | ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |--- |--- |--- | | business_id {Required}| string | Application specific unique identifier for the TikTok Business Account.

Pass the value of the `open_id` field returned in the response of [/tt_user/oauth2/token/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184175482945#item-link-Obtain%20a%20short-term%20access%20token) to this field. | | auto_message_id {Required}| string | The ID of the automatic message.

To retrieve the automatic messages for a Business Account, use [/business/message/auto_message/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184619749377).| | auto_message_type{Required} | string | The type of automatic message.

Enum values:
  • `WELCOME_MESSAGE`: welcome message. A welcome message is a message that is automatically sent to a user when they start a direct message conversation with you.
  • `SUGGESTED_QUESTION`: suggested question. A suggested question is a frequently asked question displayed at the beginning of a chat. When the user selects a suggested question, the user will automatically receive the corresponding preset answer.
  • `CHAT_PROMPT`: chat prompt. A chat prompt is an interactive button displayed above the input box. When users tap a chat prompt, the system will automatically generate a corresponding question for users to start the conversation.

Note: An automatic message that is pending review cannot be updated. To check the review status of an automatic message, use [/business/message/auto_message/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184619749377) and ensure the returned `audit_status` for the automatic message is not `REVIEWING`. | | welcome_message {+Conditional} | object | Required when `auto_message_type` is `WELCOME_MESSAGE`.

Information about the welcome message. | #| content{+Conditional} | string | Required when `welcome_message` is passed.

The text of the welcome message.

Example: `Hi there, Please leave us a message and we will respond to you shortly. Thank you!`. | | suggested_question {+Conditional} | object | Required when `auto_message_type` is `SUGGESTED_QUESTION`.

Information about the suggested question.

You can only update one suggested question per call.
To update multiple suggested questions, call `/business/message/auto_message/update/` multiple times. | #| question{+Conditional} | string | Required when `suggested_question` is passed.

A frequently asked question to help users start a conversation.

Length limit: 80 characters. | #| answer{+Conditional} | string | Required when `suggested_question` is passed.

The preset answer that will be automatically sent when a user selects the question.

Length limit: 200 characters. | | chat_prompt {+Conditional} | object | Required when `auto_message_type` is `CHAT_PROMPT`.

Information about the chat prompt. | #| title{+Conditional} | string | Required when `chat_prompt` is passed.

The name of the prompt button that is displayed above the input box.

Length limit: 18 characters.

You can use text, system emojis, and both English and non-English languages.

To ensure optimal display, keep the name concise and clear. | #| content {+Conditional} | string | Required when `chat_prompt` is passed.

The corresponding question for the prompt that the system automatically generates for users to start the conversation when users tap the chat prompt.

Length limit: 150 characters.

You can use text, system emojis, and both English and non-English languages. | ``` ### Example #### Update a welcome message ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/auto_message/update/' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "business_id": "{{business_id}}", "auto_message_id": "{{auto_message_id}}", "auto_message_type": "WELCOME_MESSAGE", "welcome_message": { "content": "{{content}}" } }' (/code) ``` #### Update a suggested question ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/auto_message/update/' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "business_id": "{{business_id}}", "auto_message_id": "{{auto_message_id}}", "auto_message_type": "SUGGESTED_QUESTION", "suggested_question": { "question": "{{question}}", "answer":"{{answer}}" } }' (/code) ``` #### Update a chat prompt ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/auto_message/update/' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "business_id": "{{business_id}}", "auto_message_id": "{{auto_message_id}}", "auto_message_type": "CHAT_PROMPT", "chat_prompt": { "title": "{{title}}", "content":"{{content}}" } }' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix-Return Code](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message|string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request. | |data |object|Returned data.| #| auto_message | object | Information about the automatic message. | ##| auto_message_id | string | The ID of the automatic message. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "auto_message": { "auto_message_id": "{{auto_message_id}}" } } } (/code) ```
